creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
# cat /usr/local/etc/fscd.conf 

(empty)

# fscadm enable sshd 
Monitoring service.

# cat /usr/local/etc/fscd.conf
sshd

# fscadm status            
The fscd pid is 96393.
process name                             pid
--------------------------------------------------
sshd                                     37690

# service squid stop



# fscadm enable squid        
Could not start service.



# service squid start
Starting squid.

# sockstat -l4
USER     COMMAND    PID   FD PROTO  LOCAL ADDRESS         FOREIGN ADDRESS      
squid    squid      25003 5  udp46  *:42282               *:*
squid    squid      25003 8  udp4   *:64163               *:*
squid    squid      25003 17 tcp46  *:3128                *:*
root     sshd       37690 4  tcp4   *:22                  *:*
